creator: Alexander Terp
description:
Sorting a list containing NaN values produces nonsensical results because NaN violates comparison transitivity.

**Repro:**
```
items = [5, 4, 0.0/0, 3, 0.0/0, 2, 1]
print(items.sort())
// [4, 5, NaN, 3, NaN, 1, 2] (broken)
```

Should either error on NaN in sort or handle it explicitly (e.g. sort NaN to end).

**Test files:** `bugs/operators/68_comparison_with_nan.rad`, `87_nan_sort_deeper.rad`
title: NaN poisons list sorting - produces completely broken order
